searchDocs.title: Check​
searchDocs.content: </> HasPermission:Check( player: Player ,-- The player to check permission: Permission-- The permission to evaluate ) → boolean-- Whether the player has the permission

type Permission = string | "RequireAll" | {Permission}  Checks if a player has a given permission. Delegates to eithertableCheck or stringCheck based on the type of permission. Use '!' before a check name to check if the permission is NOT granted.

searchDocs.title: Exists​
searchDocs.content: </> HasPermission:Exists( name: Name-- The name of the check ) → boolean Returns true if a permission check

searchDocs.title: Register​
searchDocs.content: </> HasPermission:Register( name: Name,-- The name of the check callback: Check ) → boolean-- Whether the permission check has been registered
type Check = ( player: Player , args: {string} ) → boolean  Checks if a permission check has been registered.

searchDocs.title: Unregister​
searchDocs.content: </> HasPermission:Unregister( name: Name-- The name of the check ) → () Unregisters a permission check used against players.
